input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OGNL has optional/security-manager and deep-reflection code paths controlled by system properties such as ognl.security.manager, but normal meaningful coverage does not require enabling them.

Tests that intentionally exercise JDK-internal or non-public reflective access may need Gradle/JVM --add-opens configuration, as the existing scaffold already does for java.base/java.lang; this is test design risk rather than a prerequisite deterministic setup item.
The reported Java-run failure appears to be a behavior/assertion mismatch when reusing 3.2.21 tests against 3.3.5, not missing external setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-memory Java expression/reflection library; the resolved 3.3.5 artifact has only the normal transitive runtime dependency on Javassist and does not require a service, Docker image, or extra test dependency before meaningful coverage is reachable.
